message:
docs(beads): enhance mesh feature beads with comprehensive test specs

Enhanced three P0 mesh feature beads with detailed test scenarios:

- flywheel_connectors-1n78.17.5 (Gossip Baseline):
  - Added 4 test categories: summary, request handling, quarantine, simulation
  - Added JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35
  - Added golden vector specifications

- flywheel_connectors-1n78.17.2 (Transport Priority):
  - Added path ranking, policy enforcement, multipath selection tests
  - Added MeshNode integration tests
  - Added structured logging for transport decisions

- flywheel_connectors-1n78.17.4 (SymbolRequest):
  - Added bounding, property, adversarial, DecodeStatus, SymbolAck tests
  - Added targeted repair engine tests
  - Added integration tests with lossy network simulation

All beads now include:
- Detailed Rust test code examples
- JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35
- Golden vector specifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
